untranslatable_reason: The 'Adam and Eve' spike pattern requires visual pattern recognition (identification of spike with close near daily low, followed by second spike). This cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The core pattern detection (long spike + close near low) lacks a dedicated indicator. Approximated entry conditions using wick ratios and close-to-low proximity, but true pattern validation would require candlestick pattern recognition not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate spike pattern using: upper_wick < lower_wick (inverted hammer suggesting spike) and close < low (though close cannot be below low in real data—this signals pattern untranslatability). Exit conditions based on cited 55% and 62% gain targets converted to returns scale (0.55 = 55%). Hold period set to 3 days based on 'sell day after spike' guidance. Original source text fragment does not contain actionable pattern parameters.
